title: centaurea boissieri subsp. jaennensis
intro: Centaurea boissieri subsp. jaennensis, also known as Jaen Knapweed, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the sunflower family. This plant is a type of thistle that has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects. The health benefits of Centaurea boissieri subsp. jaennensis include reducing pain and inflammation, as well as promoting wound healing and skin regeneration. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be used to treat various health issues, including digestive problems and skin conditions.
